reviews.review_description: This game takes you back to the glory days of late 1970’s early 1980’s arcade games when Vector Graphics were become more widely used. Games like asteroids, battle zone, tempest, and the first Star Wars arcade game were Vector Graphic Classics. This game uses those exact same types of graphics while playing like a mix of all the games mentioned. If you loved them then or are interested I. Seeing what the buzz was about this is a great VR example of that. Defenders wanted.

It's basically the 80s gaming experience in VR. The ship models, sounds, shooting mechanics, everything works really well together and reminds me of my ZX Spectrum from back in the day. It's a really fun game so far and already longer than I expected, hoping you guys can bring more titles in this style!
